phase1_target_understanding: Minimal repo-native path: import Transformers ASR stack, load openai/whisper-large-v3-turbo, run one audio-path transcription, and obtain non-empty text.
The requested fixture is task-specific in intent, but the exact multilingual shared file is missing in-repo, so phase 1 will use a recorded shared fallback.
Backend choice is a strong initial recommendation, not an immutable constraint: uv is preferred by input and is the least-risk backend compatible with this Python-only CPU path.

If validation fails, check integration first, then dependency compatibility, and only then fixture mismatch because the fallback fixture is intentionally weaker than the requested multilingual target.
